name: NeuroKit2: The Python Toolbox for Neurophysiological Signal Processing
description: NeuroKit2 is an open-source Python toolbox designed for the comprehensive processing and analysis of neurophysiological signals. It supports a wide range of modalities, including electrocardiography (ECG), electroencephalography (EEG), electrodermal activity (EDA), electromyography (EMG), and photoplethysmography (PPG). This distribution is part of a reproducibility and open-science initiative focused on providing standardized tools for physiological data analysis in research contexts, including psychophysiology and behavioral sciences.
